raw.subject: Something I noticed about Pensacola's Self Care Spa
raw.body:
Hi,

Pensacola's Self Care Spa is in East Hill, which seems to be a lovely neighborhood for a salon and spa.

But I noticed you don't have your own website yet, which might make it harder for potential customers to find and book your services.

I sketched a homepage idea that highlights your services menu, work gallery, and booking CTA.

https://sites.damianbasilio.dev/preview/pensacola-s-self-care-spa-hydrafacials-skincare-headspa-nano

Let's discuss how a simple website can help your business grow. As a local business expert, I offer a flat fee for local businesses like yours. Would you be available for a quick call to explore further?
